headline: Warren Buffett Was Right: Better Grab Safe Berkshire Hathaway Dividend Stocks Now
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s massive portfolio is invested in ... headline: Three-Peat: Momentum Named Agency of the Year Again
summary: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global experience agency, Momentum, has been named Experiential Agency of the Year by Campaign US for the third consecutive year. Campaign US cited “While AI and tech tools captured the lion’s share of conversation and investment for much of the industry over the past year, Momentum stands out for staying laser-focused on what truly matters: the people.
